summary: Post front-matter schema — layout, title, date required for Jekyll routing
Two-mode silo agent architecture — developer mode and visitor mode, explicit transitions
Multi-platform canonical URL strategy — each export uses platform-specific URL scheme while source URL remains canonical
Stable post filenames rule — post filenames include full publish date to prevent 404s on cached URLs after re-publish
ADR template with context, decision, alternatives considered, consequences, and related links
